title: Fabric Kazzen
description: A simple Soft-Modded Vanilla pack made for a group of friends.
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PwyxMN09/images/47c02c7fcdc82de21595b98493408e06561a14e0.png)

Welcome!

This Modpack's main purpose is to be a played with friends and also a base for further customizations and make your own!

It's main components for the gameplay decoration and feels are already installed, like Fresh Animations and Icons!

More mods can be installed along without any issues*.

---

### Whoa, I want FPS!
Fabric Kazzen is a Lightweight Modpack, with performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium and more!

### What about OptiFine?
Fabric Kazzen has all the Optifine features you desire, including shaders, connected textures and zoom!

### Is this hostable?
Well, of course! And, there's also a good news: A public server is already hosted and ready to be played.
![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/ggt9Blo.png)
#### But, since it's public and some people play the game everyday, be gentle, don't grief nor steal stuff.

---

#### *Note: Most of the mods aren't at the latest version due to compatibility between mods, mostly because of Create;
#### If you don't feel "techie enough" to modify this pack, I suggest you to play it as it is.
  
#### This means that in case you decide to update a mod, or add a new one, that requires a newer version of "X" mod, you're doing it at your own risk!
#### But, if you're using this modpack like a base to make your own, then it somehow means that you know what are you doing. 
#### Feel free to tweak, test and play it as you like if you know what are you doing.
